exchg: # All rows use the typed multi-exchange grammar:
# exchg symbol name tps_run essais tOut pause side oType oDelta qty tType tDelta prix tp hook
# Use KRKF for Kraken Futures and explicit symbols per row.
# ADA rebound after upward move: RB_SELL waits for UP_BUY tail close.
# BTC lead then ADA follow: ADA starts only after the BTC head fills.
# ADA down move and rebound: RB_BUY waits for DW_SELL tail close.
